name: Traditional Coffee Table with Storage Shelf  Classic White - Room Essentials™
description:
Transform your space with the refined simplicity of this Traditional Coffee Table from Room Essentials™. Standing at a height of 18 inches on four straight legs, this rectangular table has a pristine white silhouette that effortlessly complements any existing decor, creating a eye-catching focal point that brightens up the space. It’s designed with a smooth tabletop and a shelf at the bottom, giving you ample space for displaying your favorite books or decor pieces or resting a cup of coffee.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 35.98 inches
Overall Height: 18.19 inches
Overall Depth: 22.01 inches
Distance from floor to bottom shelf: 3.35 inches
Distance between front legs: 32.2 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 18.23 inches
Distance between shelf and top: 10.59 inches
